creator: seanc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Actually, I take this back.  This support is already present in BSD's version of Go, but under a different package: https://godoc.org/golang.org/x/sys/unix.

Hat tip to Brad Fitzpatrick for pointing this out:

https://github.com/golang/go/issues/15136#issuecomment-205935026

I wish Go's ENOTIMPLEMENTED was a bit more upfront with this, but we're in a good place with the BSDs and mlockall and its friends.
